title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/compression_engine.py (第 1040 至 1220 行，共 1441 行) ---
1040 |             state.tool_safety_notes.append("压缩前检测到不完整或孤立 tool pair，结构化状态仅基于 provider-safe turn 聚合")
1041 |         state.tool_safety_notes.append("压缩结果不得包含半截 assistant tool call 与 tool 响应")
1042 | 
1043 |         if dropped_turns:
1044 |             dropped_categories = sorted({category for turn in dropped_turns for category in turn.categories})
1045 |             state.dropped_content_summary = f"丢弃 {len(dropped_turns)} 个较低优先级 turn"
1046 |             if dropped_categories:
1047 |                 state.dropped_content_summary += f"，类别: {', '.join(dropped_categories[:8])}"
1048 | 
1049 |         if llm_summary_text:
1050 |             state.key_decisions.extend(self._extract_llm_decision_lines(llm_summary_text))
1051 | 
1052 |         state.completed_steps = self._dedupe_keep_order(state.completed_steps)[:12]
1053 |         state.pending_steps = self._dedupe_keep_order(state.pending_steps)[:12]
1054 |         state.key_decisions = self._dedupe_keep_order(state.key_decisions)[:12]
1055 |         state.user_preferences = self._dedupe_keep_order(state.user_preferences)[:8]
1056 |         state.commands_run = self._dedupe_dicts(state.commands_run, "command")[:12]
1057 |         state.tests_run = self._dedupe_dicts(state.tests_run, "command")[:12]
1058 |         state.errors_encountered = self._dedupe_dicts(state.errors_encountered, "message")[:10]
1059 |         return state
1060 | 
1061 |     def _extract_task_goal(self, turns: List[ConversationTurn]) -> str:
1062 |         for turn in turns:
1063 |             if turn.user_message and isinstance(turn.user_message.get("content"), str):
1064 |                 content = turn.user_message.get("content", "").strip()
1065 |                 if content:
1066 |                     return content[:200]
1067 |         return ""
1068 | 
1069 |     def _infer_current_status(self, turns: List[ConversationTurn]) -> str:
1070 |         text = "\n".join(self._turn_text(turn) for turn in turns[-6:]).lower()
1071 |         if any(keyword in text for keyword in ["traceback", "failed", "失败", "错误", "❌"]):
1072 |             if not any(keyword in text for keyword in ["passed", "测试通过", "修复", "✅"]):
1073 |                 return "failed"
1074 |         if any(keyword in text for keyword in ["全部完成", "任务完成", "已完成", "done", "completed"]):
1075 |             return "completed"
1076 |         return "in_progress"
1077 | 
1078 |     def _turn_text(self, turn: ConversationTurn) -> str:
1079 |         return "\n".join(str(msg.get("content", "")) for msg in turn.messages if isinstance(msg, dict))
1080 | 
1081 |     def _collect_steps(self, text: str, completed: List[str], pending: List[str]) -> None:
1082 |         for line in text.splitlines():
1083 |             clean = line.strip(" -\t")[:220]
1084 |             if not clean:
1085 |                 continue
1086 |             lowered = clean.lower()
1087 |             if any(marker in clean for marker in ["✅", "已完成", "完成:", "完成："]) or lowered.startswith(("done", "completed")):
1088 |                 completed.append(clean)
1089 |             if any(marker in clean for marker in ["⏳", "未完成", "待办", "下一步", "todo"]):
1090 |                 pending.append(clean)
1091 | 
1092 |     def _collect_decisions(self, text: str, decisions: List[str]) -> None:
1093 |         keywords = ["决定", "决策", "选择", "采用", "建议", "注意", "必须", "保持", "不要"]
1094 |         for line in text.splitlines():
1095 |             clean = line.strip(" -\t")
1096 |             if 8 <= len(clean) <= 260 and any(keyword in clean for keyword in keywords):
1097 |                 decisions.append(clean[:260])
1098 | 
1099 |     def _collect_preferences(self, text: str, preferences: List[str]) -> None:
1100 |         for line in text.splitlines():
1101 |             clean = line.strip(" -\t")
1102 |             if any(keyword in clean for keyword in ["用户偏好", "prefer", "preference", "希望", "要求"]):
1103 |                 preferences.append...
